CREATE TABLE test_multiplication (id INT, value INT);
SELECT id, value, value * 2 AS doubled_value FROM test_multiplication;
SELECT id, value, (value * 3) + 5 AS modified_value FROM test_multiplication WHERE value < 5;
SELECT (SELECT value FROM test_multiplication WHERE id = 1) * (SELECT value FROM test_multiplication WHERE id = 2) AS product;
SELECT a.id, a.value * b.value AS multiplication_result FROM test_multiplication a JOIN test_multiplication b ON a.id != b.id;
WITH multipliers AS (SELECT 2 AS multiplier UNION SELECT 3 AS multiplier) SELECT id, value * m.multiplier AS varied_value FROM test_multiplication, multipliers m;
SELECT SUM(value * 2) AS total_doubled FROM test_multiplication;
SELECT id, value * value AS squared_value FROM test_multiplication WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_multiplication WHERE value > 3);
SELECT a.id, b.id, a.value * b.value AS cross_product FROM test_multiplication a, test_multiplication b WHERE a.id < b.id;
